name: pyre-code
description: LeetCode-style ML coding problems — implement PyTorch modules from scratch
author: kiren

scripts.build:solutions: bash -c 'if [ "$CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV" = "pyre" ]; then python scripts/build_solutions.py; else .venv/bin/python scripts/build_solutions.py; fi'
scripts.predev: bash -c 'if [ "$CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV" = "pyre" ]; then python -c "import sys; sys.exit(0)"; elif [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then exit 0; else echo "\nERROR: .venv not found or not executable. Run ./setup.sh first.\n" && exit 1; fi'
scripts.dev:backend: bash -c 'if [ "$CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV" = "pyre" ]; then python -m uvicorn grading_service.main:app --reload --reload-exclude .git --reload-exclude .venv --port 8000 --log-level info; else .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn grading_service.main:app --reload --reload-exclude .git --reload-exclude .venv --port 8000 --log-level info; fi'
